title: IOP | Paradex Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The report provides a detailed methodology, identifies multiple critical vulnerabilities, and includes proof of concepts and recommendations. The submission is well-structured and demonstrates a thorough understanding of the security assessment process.
audit.improvements: The report is missing a few improvements section, but it is not a major issue. The report could benefit from a more detailed analysis of the impact of each vulnerability and potential mitigation strategies.
